mapper.select:
select s.id, s.tenant_id, s.accessory_id, s.warehouse_code, s.quantity, s.remark, s.del_flag, s.delete_by, s.delete_time, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, a.accessory_code, a.name as accessory_name from equipment_accessory_stock s inner join equipment_accessory a on a.id = s.accessory_id and a.tenant_id = s.tenant_id and (a.del_flag = 0 or a.del_flag is null)
s.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (s.del_flag = 0 or s.del_flag is null) and s.accessory_id = #{accessoryId} and s.warehouse_code like concat('%', #{warehouseCode}, '%') and a.accessory_code like concat('%', #{accessoryCode}, '%') and a.name like concat('%', #{accessoryName}, '%')
order by s.update_time desc, s.create_time desc

select s.id, s.tenant_id, s.accessory_id, s.warehouse_code, s.quantity, s.remark, s.del_flag, s.delete_by, s.delete_time, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time from equipment_accessory_stock s where s.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and s.accessory_id = #{accessoryId} and s.warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode} and (s.del_flag = 0 or s.del_flag is null) limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into equipment_accessory_stock (id, tenant_id, accessory_id, warehouse_code, quantity, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{accessoryId}, #{warehouseCode}, #{quantity}, #{remark}, 0, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update equipment_accessory_stock set quantity = quantity + #{qty}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null)
